## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::ZodiacAquarius;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        ZodiacAquarius { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
water bearer, waves, innovation, air, future, astrology, star sign, horoscope, constellation, celestial

## Categories
social, emoji
